article.title: Get blazing Wi-Fi 7 speeds with a record price drop on the ASUS RT-BE82U Dual-Band Router
article.summary: If you are looking to upgrade your home network, the ASUS RT-BE82U Dual-Band Wi-Fi 7 Router is currently available for just $119, down from $167.99, which means a solid 40% off the normal price. This powerful router delivers ultra-fast speeds of up to 6500 Mbps. It features AI-boosted Smart AiMesh technology for boosted coverage. The router is equipped with five 2.5 GbE ports, optimizing wired connections. It also supports up to three SSIDs for IoT devices and includes features like parental controls and VPN support for enhanced security.
article.title_zh: 以破紀錄低價購買 ASUS RT-BE82U 雙頻路由器享受閃電般的 Wi-Fi 7 速度
article.summary_zh: ASUS RT-BE82U Wi-Fi 7 路由器現以 $119 價格販售，降幅達 40%，提供高達 6500 Mbps 的超快速度。

article.title: Apple wins latest round in Masimo fight as ITC closes Apple Watch import ban case
article.summary: Apple just scored an important win in its ongoing battle with Masimo over patents related to the Apple Watch’s blood oxygen feature. Here are the details. more…
article.title_zh: Apple 在與 Masimo 的糾紛中贏得最新一輪勝利，ITC 關閉 Apple Watch 進口禁令案
article.summary_zh: Apple 在與 Masimo 關於 Apple Watch 血氧功能專利的持續訴訟中取得重要勝利。

article.title: Could See a SpaceX-Tesla Merger Before the IPO: Ray Wang
article.summary: Constellation Research CEO Ray Wang discusses the current AI landscape, why software is the ‘next piece to comeback,’ and the possibility of a SpaceX-Tesla merger. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: Ray Wang：IPO 前可能看到 SpaceX-Tesla 合併
article.summary_zh: Constellation Research 執行長 Ray Wang 討論當前 AI 格局、軟體何以成為「下個回歸之作」，以及 SpaceX-Tesla 合併的可能性。

article.title: US-sanctioned currency exchange says $15 million heist done by "unfriendly states"
article.summary: Grinex, a US-sanctioned cryptocurrency exchange registered in Kyrgyzstan, said it’s halting operations after experiencing a $13 million heist carried out by “western special services” hackers. Researchers from TRM, which has confirmed the theft, put the value of stolen assets at $15 million after discovering roughly 70 drained addresses, about 16 more than Grinex reported. Neither TRM nor fellow blockchain research firm Elliptic has said how the attackers slipped past Grinex’s defenses. Grinex said it has been under almost constant attack attempts since incorporating 16 months ago. The latest attacks, it said, targeted Russian users of the exchange. Damaging "Russia's financial sovereignty" “The digital footprints and nature of the attack indicate an unprecedented level of resources and te
article.title_zh: 美國制裁加密貨幣交易所聲稱 1,500 萬美元盜竊由「敵對國家」實施
article.summary_zh: 美國制裁的吉爾吉斯斯坦註冊加密貨幣交易所 Grinex 在遭遇 1,300 萬美元盜竊後宣布停止營運，該盜竊據稱由「西方特別部隊」駭客實施。

article.title: How to prepare your company for the era of agentic ITops
article.summary: Rules-based IT operations cost businesses hundreds of billions of dollars every year. If your company depends on human labor to paper over where partial IT automation falls short, you know how much it costs to keep systems online, access controlled, and users properly provisioned. Agentic AI offers a better path forward. Instead of relying on brittle, partial automation, modern companies can use AI agents to keep their technology running smoothly with less human input. The result? Less downtime, faster service, and lower costs. But, as always, there’s a catch. Agentic AI is no panacea on its own. If you want to use agentic AI to automate and accelerate your IT operations, you need to get your data in order. Today, that information may be siloed, trapped in different repositories that
article.title_zh: 如何為您的公司做好 Agentic ITops 時代的準備
article.summary_zh: 基於規則的 IT 運營每年耗費企業數千億美元。Agentic AI 提供了一個解決方案，可以減少對人力的依賴，並降低系統維護、存取控制和使用者配置的成本。

article.title: Google brings individual hotel price tracking to Search for all your summer travel needs
article.summary: Google is adding a new tool to Search that should allow users to save a little bit of cash on their upcoming summer vacations. more…
article.title_zh: Google 在 Search 中推出單家飯店價格追蹤功能，滿足您的夏季旅遊需求
article.summary_zh: Google 在 Search 新增工具，讓使用者可以追蹤單家飯店的價格，節省夏季假期開支。

article.title: Google and Pentagon in talks to run custom AI chips inside classified environments — Google pushes for tight controls for TPUs surrounding use for mass surveillance and autonomous weapons
article.summary: Google is reportedly negotiating with the U.S. Department of Defense to deploy Gemini in classified settings, with the talks covering the addition of GPU racks to Google Distributed Cloud.
article.title_zh: Google 與五角大廈洽談在機密環境中運行自訂 AI 晶片 — Google 力促對 TPU 的嚴格控制以防止大規模監控和自主武器
article.summary_zh: Google 據報正與美國國防部談判在機密環境中部署 Gemini，談判涵蓋向 Google Distributed Cloud 添加 GPU 機櫃。

article.title: Nvidia Helps Make Quantum Computing CEO a Billionaire in Days
article.summary: The founder of quantum computing startup Xanadu Quantum Technologies Ltd. became a billionaire in a matter of days after Nvidia Corp. threw its weight behind the emerging technology.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 幫助量子計算 CEO 在數日內成為十億富翁
article.summary_zh: 量子計算初創公司 Xanadu Quantum Technologies Ltd. 的創始人在 Nvidia Corp. 支持該新興技術後數日內成為十億富翁。

article.title: Anthropic launches Claude Design following Opus 4.7 model upgrade
article.summary: After two previous design-related updates this week, Anthropic is out with a new product today: Claude Design. The new Claude Design joins an existing suite of Mac tools, including Claude Cowork and Claude Code. more…
article.title_zh: Anthropic 在推出 Opus 4.7 模型升級後推出 Claude Design
article.summary_zh: Anthropic 今日推出新產品 Claude Design，加入現有的 Mac 工具套件中的 Claude Cowork 和 Claude Code。

article.title: Notebooks are now available for free Gemini app users
article.summary: After rolling out to Google AI subscribers earlier this month , the Gemini app has now launched notebooks to free users. more…
article.title_zh: 免費 Gemini 應用用戶現已可使用 Notebooks
article.summary_zh: Gemini 應用於本月早前向 Google AI 訂閱者推出 Notebooks 後，現已向免費用戶推出。

article.title: Spotify has redesigned its tablet app, here's what's new
article.summary: Today Spotify has announced that it's revamped its tablet interface - for both Android tablets and iPads. The "new app experience" is tailored for tablets from the ground up, and is "designed to make listening, watching, and discovery feel more natural on larger screens", according to the official press release. The redesigned tablet UI isn't just a scaled up phone version as before. Instead, it's designed to take advantage of the extra screen real estate, "so you can browse and discover new favorites right alongside what you're already playing". The UI...
article.title_zh: Spotify 重新設計平板應用程式
article.summary_zh: Spotify 宣佈推出平板介面改版，同時支援 Android 平板和 iPad，新應用體驗針對大屏幕優化，讓聆聽、觀看和發現內容更自然。

article.title: YouTube is ditching ‘Clips,’ officially brings ‘share at timestamp’ to phones
article.summary: YouTube is changing how you share specific moments in videos, ditching its “Clips” feature and more prominently showing on phones. more…
article.title_zh: YouTube 放棄「Clips」功能，在手機上正式推出「在指定時間戳記分享」
article.summary_zh: YouTube 改變了分享影片特定片段的方式，在手機上放棄「Clips」功能並推出更醒目的時間戳記分享功能。

article.title: Samsung’s latest Galaxy Tab for your kids could outlast their childhood
article.summary: Credit: Samsung TL;DR Samsung has introduced a new Kids Edition tablet. The tablet itself isn’t new, but it comes with kid-friendly accessories. The tablet also offers impressively long software support. Samsung has a new tablet aimed at addressing parents’ concerns about their kids’ online safety. It has announced a special edition of the Galaxy Tab A11 Plus, with additional perks for parents to ensure safe usage. The special Kids Edition is the successor to the Galaxy A9 Plus Kids Edition from 2024. The Galaxy Tab A11 Plus Kids Edition bundle is essentially the Tab A11 Plus with extra accessories, including a sturdy foam case, a cryon-shaped stylus, and a stylus tether. The back of the case also features a handle that doubles as a kickstand. You also get a pack of stickers to add a littl
article.title_zh: Samsung 最新兒童版 Galaxy Tab 可以陪伴孩子到成長
article.summary_zh: Samsung 推出新兒童版平板電腦，搭配兒童友善配件並提供卓越的軟體支援。

article.title: Google tests Play Store UI change that should help picky gamers save time
article.summary: Credit: Megan Ellis / Android Authority TL;DR Google is testing a redesigned Games tab in the Play Store that adds prominent, scrollable genre bubbles. The update also brings these genre bubbles to the Top Charts tab, replacing the easily overlooked and overwhelming Categories dropdown. The Google Play Store remains the beating heart of Android for Google and its users. Naturally, this app has received plenty of attention, especially for its Games tab. Now, it appears that Google is giving this section of the app another new lick of paint. NEWSLETTER | Authority Insights --> Authority Insights You're reading an Authority Insights story. article.title_zh: Google 測試 Play Store 使用介面變更，應能幫助挑剔的遊戲玩家節省時間
article.summary_zh: Google 測試 Play Store 遊戲標籤的重新設計，新增顯著的可滑動類型氣泡。
